name: analytics-engineering
description: Analytics-engineering team — 3 agents (analytics-engineer, semantic-layer-engineer, data-quality-testing-engineer) for the TRANSFORMATION layer in the modern data stack: dbt modeling (staging -> intermediate -> marts, the medallion/Kimball split, incremental models, materializations), a governed semantic/metrics layer (one definition of revenue/active-user, metrics-as-code) so every tool agrees, and data quality (dbt tests, freshness, model contracts, anomaly checks) that gates the warehouse. Warehouse-neutral (Snowflake/BigQuery/Redshift/Databricks). 5 skills, a decision-tree knowledge bank (materialization + model-layer trees + a dated 2026 map), 12 best-practices, 4 templates, 4 commands, 1 advisory hook. Distinct from data-platform (ingestion/warehouse/BI) and database-engineering (OLTP). Seams: ELT/warehouse provisioning -> data-platform, OLTP -> database-engineering, BI -> tableau/data-platform, enterprise lakehouse -> microsoft-fabric. Requires ravenclaude-core@>=0.7.0.
